name: Peshawari Charsi Chicken Tikka
description: Authentic salted chicken tikka grilled over oak charcoal, prepared with traditional salt and green chili marinade.

name: Paneer Reshmi Kabab (4 Pcs)
description: Exquisite soft cottage cheese chunks marinated in cream, saffron, and fresh ground cardamom, grilled over low embers.

name: Lahori Halwa Puri Nashta
description: Fresh golden puries served with spiced chickpea curry (cholay), potato bhujia, and rich semolina halwa cooked in ghee.

name: Shahi Zafrani Kheer
description: Traditional slow-cooked milk and rice pudding, flavored with real saffron threads, cardamoms, almonds, and served chilled.

name: Shami Kabab (Duo Pack)
description: Two traditional crispy-fried pan-grilled patties of minced beef and chana dal, heavily spiced with whole garam masala.

name: Special Mutton Yakhni Pulao
description: Fragrant basmati rice slow-cooked in rich goat-meat broth (yakhni), topped with dynamic spices and caramelized onions.
